title: Harden gateway config manual-location CBOR edge coverage
description: Follow-up from project-LICHEN-zte2.8 reviews. Add non-blocking coverage/hardening for configured manual/static location CBOR: duplicate lon_i/hacc_mm/age_s tests, unknown nested map/array extension skipping test, explicit source_name policy for embedded NUL/non-printable text, and defensive behavior if config_get encoding returns 0 or a future caller passes an invalid manual config to the encoder.
notes:
Implementation evidence 2026-07-02:
- Hardened manual-location CBOR encoder/decoder: invalid manual configs encode as 0, lat/lon validity required for encode/decode, source_name is NUL-terminated printable ASCII only, and decode rejects embedded NUL/control/DEL/non-ASCII bytes.
- Added gateway_config tests for duplicate lon_i/hacc_mm/age_s, nested unknown map/array extension skipping, invalid source_name bytes, invalid manual configs, and too-small encoder buffers.
- Added /config GET defensive handling so a zero-length config encode returns CoAP 5.00 instead of a zero-byte success payload.
- Added build-only Twister sample coverage for lichen/apps/gateway on native_sim and qemu_x86 with fixed LICHEN_RELEASE_EPOCH_UNIX=1710000000. This uses the firmware build-time epoch path for deterministic no-hardware app builds.
- EC2 first rerun found two issues now fixed: app sample needed release epoch; shared HAL charger/fuel-gauge helper functions were unused in app builds without battery/PMIC support. HAL helpers are now compiled only when runtime users or CONFIG_ZTEST wrappers need them.
- Reviews: James clean; Gibbs clean; Euclid P2 app main.c lacked Twister app build coverage, fixed with sample.yaml; Heisenberg clean; Franklin only warned about unrelated untracked Renode scratch file, not included; Lorentz clean on expanded diff; Nash no P0/P1/P2 findings and listed residual low-risk coverage gaps.
- Local check: git diff --check passed.
- EC2 validation on i-0f3bcb4b30ca243d3 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr, clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-zte210-validate: west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_config -T lichen/apps/gateway -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-zte210-final --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen passed. Result: 3 scenarios / 6 test instances selected; 4/6 configs passed, 2 static-filter skips, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings, 87.20s; 42 test cases executed, 4 skipped; 2 configs executed and 2 build-only.
- Size output: native_sim app.lichen.gateway text=157043 data=6061 bss=54806 dec=217910; native_sim net.lichen.gateway_config text=52758 data=613 bss=9592 dec=62963; qemu_x86 app.lichen.gateway text=142544 data=5062 bss=103156 dec=250762; qemu_x86 net.lichen.gateway_config text=85936 data=4184 bss=88660 dec=178780.
EC2 cleanup 2026-07-02: synced and unmounted /mnt/lichen-zephyr on i-0f3bcb4b30ca243d3; detached EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and verified state=available attachments=[]; terminated instance; deleted temporary security group sg-04d303d4c678c2828 and key pair lichen-zte210-20260702165026.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware manual-location CBOR hardening, gateway app build-only Twister coverage, HAL app-build guard fix, reviews, and EC2 native_sim/qemu_x86 validation with evidence recorded.
